name: Balsamic Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in a large pot of boiling salted water over medium heat until tender, about 15-20 minutes.
2. Make balsamic dressing: Whisk together sour cream, balsamic vinegar, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a bowl until blended.
3. Stir in all but 2 tablespoons of sliced scallions into the dressing.
4. Drain potatoes well in a colander.
5. Transfer potatoes to a bowl; add dressing and gently toss to coat.
6. Let potatoes cool to room temperature.
7. Add celery and radishes to potatoes in the bowl and gently toss to combine.
8. Line serving bowl with romaine lettuce leaves and spoon potato salad onto the lettuce.
9. Sprinkle salad with reserved scallions.
105 calories per serving.
